languages.text: "Эоганн, они не объекты. Ты говоришь о людях".
"Organisms? They are not things, Eogunn. You are talking about people."
languages.original_text: "Эоганн, они не объекты. Ты говоришь о людях".

traits.locale_text: "Organisms? They are not things, Eogunn. You are talking about people."
"Organisms? They are not things, Eogunn. You are talking about people."
"Organisms? They are not things, Eogunn. You are talking about people."

languages.text: 「生物？それは物じゃない、エオガン。あなたは人について話している」
languages.original_text: "Organisms? They are not things, Eogunn. You are talking about people."

traits.locale_text: 「生物？それは物じゃない、エオグン。あなたは人について話しているわ。」

languages.text: “有机体？他们又不是器物，伊奥贡。你所谈论的，可是活生生的人。”
languages.original_text: "Organisms? They are not things, Eogunn. You are talking about people."

traits.locale_text: “有机体？他们又不是器物，伊奥贡。你所谈论的，可是活生生的人。”

languages.text: «¿Organismos? No son pedazos de carne, Eogunn. Está hablando de personas».
languages.original_text: "Organisms? They are not things, Eogunn. You are talking about people."

traits.locale_text: «¿Organismos? No son pedazos de carne, Eogunn. Está hablando de personas».

languages.text: "Organismen? Das sind keine Gegenstände, Eogunn. Ihr sprecht über Menschen."
languages.original_text: "Organisms? They are not things, Eogunn. You are talking about people."

traits.locale_text: "Organismen? Das sind keine Gegenstände, Eogunn. Ihr sprecht über Menschen."

languages.text: « Des organismes ? Ce ne sont pas des choses, Eogunn. Vous parlez de personnes. »
languages.original_text: "Organisms? They are not things, Eogunn. You are talking about people."

traits.locale_text: « Des organismes ? Ce ne sont pas des choses, Eogunn. Vous parlez de personnes. »

languages.text: "Organizmalar mı? Onlar eşya değil Eogunn. İnsanlardan bahsediyoruz."
languages.original_text: "Organisms? They are not things, Eogunn. You are talking about people."

traits.locale_text: "Organizmalar mı? Onlar eşya değil Eogunn. İnsanlardan bahsediyoruz."
